### Chapter 3: E+W Family Mediation Information and Assessment Meetings ( MIAMs )


### Scope of this Chapter E+W


3.5. This Chapter contains Rules about the requirement in section 10(1) of the 2014 Act to attend a MIAM .


### Applications to which the MIAM requirement applies E+W


3.6. — (1) The MIAM requirement applies to any application to initiate the proceedings specified in paragraph (2), unless a MIAM exemption F13 ... applies.


(2) The specified proceedings are—
